description: Accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. On recto mentions the name Bū l-Mufaḍḍal b. [...] and commodities such as rhubarb, turpeth, beleric myrobalan (balīlaj), myrobalan (halīlaj), and an expense on a bath (ḥammām) or pigeon (ḥamām). On verso there are sums, and at the bottom mentions a gift (bribe?) to the brokers (hiba lil-dallālīn) and al-shaykh Bū Zikrī.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בJRL.
